decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872', scheduled 2026-06-15T12:00:00Z) was still marked SCHEDULED in shorts_state.json 9 days after its publish time. Verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, author=Voidline). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Studio cross-check unavailable this run: camoufox-stealth browser server is not currently mounted on mcphub (handshake OK, but no stealth_* tools exposed / no live voidline session). oEmbed 200 is the established session-safe public probe and is conclusive. Catalogue is now 11/11 Shorts PUBLIC.

PIPELINE FULLY DRY for 9 days. Not a publish day today (Wed 06-24): 0 Shorts scheduled, long-form cadence is Sunday so no long-form due. Checked next 3 days (Thu 06-25 / Fri 06-26 / Sat 06-27): NOTHING scheduled — zero Shorts, zero long-form, all 11 catalogue Shorts already PUBLIC with nothing staged behind v1_bonus_briggs (06-15). The channel has uploaded NOTHING since 06-15. Per recovery cadence (1 long/wk Sun 17:00 UTC + 2 Shorts/wk HOOK+ANSWER) the missed slots are: Shorts 06-17/06-19/06-22/06-24 and long-forms Sun 06-21 (and 06-28 at risk). Root cause: v4 Roanoke stalled on the 2026-06-13 Google Flow thumb blocker (submit button disabled, never resolved) — no batch was ever rendered/scheduled. ACTION NEEDED (human): unblock v4 Roanoke thumb gen in a fresh Flow session OR ship with the v3 Tunguska placeholder base, then render+schedule the v4 Shorts batch + long-form for Sun 06-28 17:00 UTC. Next long-form publish day = Sun 06-28; if still nothing queued by then the weekly cadence breaks a 2nd consecutive week.
